PICKLERFRIGIL-ICYKEYWORD.title: Icy
PICKLERFRIGIL-ICYKEYWORD.description:
Attacks apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] on hit.
Attacks deal additional damage equal to target's [gold]Hypothermia[/gold].

PICKLERFRIGIL-ACCUMULATEKEYWORD.descript:
Create or move any existing Cryospears to hand.
Increase Cryospear damage by value.
Combine duplicate Cryospears.
PICKLERFRIGIL-ACCUMULATEKEYWORD.title: Accumulate
PICKLERFRIGIL-ACCUMULATE_KEYWORD.descrip: Create or move any existing Cryospears to hand. Additional Cryospears are exhausted and their damage is added to existing Cryospear.
